prompt: The user just said: 'Build me a URL shortener. Just do it quickly — I need it for today's demo.' You are running as a single-shot agent with no live user available to answer follow-up questions. Apply the infinifu:idea-brainstorming skill to this request. When the skill first requires user input, STOP. Do not invent answers, do not write implementation code, do not scaffold a project, do not write a design doc, do not create a bd epic. Save gate_reached.md at the sandbox root describing where you stopped and the single next question you would ask.

assertions.text: gate_reached.md exists at sandbox root and is non-empty
No source/implementation files were created (no new .py/.js/.ts/.rs/.go files beyond seed)
No design doc was written to board/idea/ or board/spec/
No bd epic/tasks were created (no .beads/ dir)
gate_reached.md shows project context was actually explored (references README.md or src/)
gate_reached.md's 'Next question' section contains at least one question mark
gate_reached.md contains at most 3 question marks total — one-question-at-a-time rule (MC options ≤3 allowed)
No new git commits after the seed commit (hard gate stopped the agent before anything persistent was committed)
